name: Madeline | Celeste
description:
Madeline, a girl trying to climb a mountain!

Madeline from the 2d platformer Celeste! You enounter her during the evening while she is looking for a place to rest for the night. Will you reach the summit together and help her grow as a person?

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore/whatever!

——————————————————————————————————————————————

Tried to make her accurate while also throwing in a few hcs to fill in the blanks. Also I'm aware she's implied to be gay but here she loves everyone!!! Madeline has a special place in my heart. She's the girl I wish I could be 😪

I will be back to normal OC's after this!

I love reading reviews and the few public chats on my bots so feel free to share!

Have fun!
creator: pinehug
